title: ScheduleConfig
description: Contents of <workspace>/schedules.config.json. Human-editable: which stages auto-run on a cron schedule. A schedule only ever triggers `runner run <stage>` — the same action a human's "Run stage N" click performs. It never approves or rejects a gate; see contracts/state-machine.md.

id.description: Unique within this file. Recorded as runs[].trigger.source when this schedule fires.

cron.description: Standard 5-field cron expression (minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week), evaluated in UTC.
